Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import os
os.environ['VIDEO_PATH'] = 'temp_uploads/许大直播：杠杆工具构造凸性策略.mp4'

from processor import VideoProcessor
try:
    processor = VideoProcessor\(\)
    audio_path = processor._extract_audio\(os.environ['VIDEO_PATH']\)
    print\('Success:', audio_path\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', type\(e\).__name__, str\(e\)\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
")

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
# Simulate what Streamlit does when handling file upload
import os
import tempfile

# Simulate an uploaded file object
class FakeUploadedFile:
    def __init__\(self, name, size\):
        self.name = name
        self.size = size

# Test with the Chinese filename
test_file = FakeUploadedFile\("许大直播：杠杆工具构造凸性策略.mp4", 793271776\)
print\(f"Simulating upload of: {test_file.name}"\)

# This is what app.py does at line 142
path = os.path.join\("temp_uploads", test_file.name\)
print\(f"Saving to: {path}"\)

# Save a small test to verify path works
with open\(path, "wb"\) as out:
    # Just write first few bytes as test
    with open\("temp_uploads/许大直播：杠杆工具构造凸性策略.mp4", "rb"\) as inp:
        out.write\(inp.read\(1024\)\)

print\(f"File exists after write: {os.path.exists\(path\)}"\)

# Now try to process it
from processor import VideoProcessor
processor = VideoProcessor\(\)
audio_path = processor._extract_audio\(path\)
print\(f"Audio extracted: {audio_path}"\)
EOF)
